news_items.headline: Livsmedelsverket publicerade nya kostråd för vuxna över 65 år (2026)
news_items.key_point: För första gången specifika kostråd för 65+ med rekommendationer om aptit, protein och D-vitamin.

news_items.headline: Senior nutrition trends: 54% of Boomers worldwide take multivitamins
news_items.key_point: Strong consumer demand for recognizable vitamins and minerals. Trust from familiarity.

news_items.headline: Healthspan shift: from living longer to living better in older age
news_items.key_point: Market shift from lifespan to healthspan. Seniors want science-backed ingredients for mobility, cognition, vitality.

news_items.headline: Promising healthy aging ingredients target muscle, cognition, inflammation
news_items.key_point: Magnesium, K2, omega-3s, dairy proteins, choline have strongest human evidence for healthy aging pathways.

news_items.headline: Longevity market: 50% of supplements since 2022 carry healthspan messaging
news_items.key_point: Huge growth in cellular health ingredients. NAD+, NMN, collagen surging despite regulatory challenges in EU.

news_items.headline: World Health Summit 2025: Resolution on Healthy Aging emphasizes prevention through nutrition
news_items.key_point: Healthy Ageing Decade 2021-2030. Nutrition as cornerstone of prevention in aging populations.

summary: Major developments: (1) Livsmedelsverket's first-ever 65+ specific guidelines (2026) — this is the key news hook, (2) healthspan narrative dominates 2026, (3) strong consumer interest in familiar vitamins/minerals, (4) protein for muscle maintenance is top trend in senior nutrition globally.
